demographics.living_situation: lives independently at home, alone at the time of the call

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The machine at the pharmacy said my blood pressure was dangerously high, and now I'm terrified I'm about to have a stroke.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Got a very high blood pressure number on a pharmacy machine earlier today and has been panicking at home ever since, convinced a stroke is coming.

symptom_narrative.onset: earlier today, right after a blood pressure check on a self-service machine at the pharmacy
symptom_narrative.duration: a few hours of intense worry since the reading
symptom_narrative.character: no physical symptoms at all — just overwhelming fear and a racing mind about the number
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the anxiety is severe; the patient has been pacing the house unable to settle
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: no pain or symptom anywhere — the distress is about the reading itself
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant worry since the pharmacy visit
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting quietly at home has started to calm the patient a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: thinking about the number and about medical machines
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: denies any headache, denies chest pain, denies shortness of breath, denies any change in vision, denies weakness or trouble speaking
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: says high readings have happened before but only ever in clinics or at machines, never a problem otherwise
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: independent and able to do everything as usual, but too anxious to relax tonight

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: gets very nervous and worked up around doctors, clinics and medical equipment
past_medical_history.how_managed: no formal treatment; just something the patient has always had

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: describes being generally healthy and not on any regular blood pressure medicine

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: wants firm reassurance that a stroke is not imminent and to avoid an emergency-department trip

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a public self-service pharmacy machine while the patient was highly anxious; uncalibrated and unwitnessed by a clinician
